name: Deep 3D App Flow Verification
description: Start from landing page, click open button, verify route changes to /app, check WebGL canvas, mini-map, 3D player camera view, room labels, test back button, and verify page refresh works without 404.

planSteps.description: Verify the landing page with 'Atrium 3D' title and 'Atrium 3D'yi Aç' or 'Open Atrium 3D' button is loaded
Click the 'Atrium 3D'yi Aç' or 'Open Atrium 3D' button to open the 3D application
Verify the browser URL path is changed to '/app'
Verify the 3D WebGL canvas element is successfully loaded and rendered on the page
Verify the 2D MiniMap tracker showing current room info is visible on the screen
Verify the HUD displays the current room label like 'Çalışma Odası' or 'Study Room'
Click the Settings button on the floating control panel
Click the Return to Home button or option to go back to the landing page
Verify the browser URL is back to the main landing page
Verify the 3D application loads correctly after reload and does not show a 404 error page
